overview.description: The PIMCO Preferred and Capital Securities Active ETF (PRFD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed to invest in a broad basket of preferred and capital securities issued by US and foreign companies. Portfolio holdings are of varying credit quality and maturity. PRFD was launched on Jan 18, 2023 and is issued by PIMCO.
